prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
# You've Got This!

Listen, that task isn't getting any smaller by waiting. The fact that you've been putting it off means it matters to you - it's worth doing right.

Take a deep breath. The hardest part is just starting. Give yourself permission to begin imperfectly - just five minutes of focused effort will build momentum.

Remember: Future You will be so grateful to Present You for pushing through this resistance. The relief you'll feel once it's done is worth far more than the temporary comfort of delay.

Now's your moment. Shoulders back, chin up. Let's turn this challenge into today's victory!
